internships.description: Join the Vercel Frontend Platform team to build next-generation developer tooling and fast, responsive web application features using React and Next.js.
requirements: Strong understanding of React, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern CSS layout techniques.
Familiarity with web performance optimization, core web vitals, and git workflow.
Previous project portfolio demonstrating clean design and responsive components.

internships.description: Work on the core payment processing backend pipelines, API infrastructure, and scale secure distributed systems that handle millions of transactions per day.
requirements: Experience in designing RESTful APIs in Node.js, Go, or Python.
Solid knowledge of databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and SQL query construction.
Strong algorithms, data structures, and system design fundamentals.

internships.description: Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to design clean, high-performance web tool layouts, micro-interactions, and beautiful dark-themed SaaS interfaces.
requirements: Excellent visual design skills and user flow wireframing inside Figma.
Strong understanding of design systems, typography, layout grid, and contrast rules.
Portfolio showcasing Web App designs and pixel-perfect attention to detail.

internships.description: Design and build production workflows utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering optimization, vector databases, and semantic search queries.
requirements: Experience calling API endpoints (Gemini, OpenAI) and writing custom prompts.
Familiarity with vector embeddings, indexing, and retrieval methods (RAG).
Proficiency in Python, Node.js, and API development.

internships.description: Help craft the future of offline-first mobile workspaces, rich-text editor components, and smooth animations using React Native for iOS and Android.
requirements: Basic experience building and deploying mobile applications with React Native.
Solid understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript, React hooks, and state management.
Understanding of mobile UI differences, performance profiles, and testing tools.

internships.description: Work with our Cloud Operations team to improve continuous deployment pipelines, maintain Kubernetes infrastructure, and build automated monitoring metrics.
requirements: Familiarity with Docker containerization, Dockerfiles, and compose configurations.
Understanding of CI/CD concepts (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI).
Familiarity with AWS, GCP, or fly.io deployment options.

internships.description: Drive product specifications, research user needs around AI assistance tools, analyze engagement telemetry, and collaborate with engineering on sprint scopes.
requirements: Exceptional communication skills and writing skills (PRDs, wireframes).
Strong analytical ability, SQL querying knowledge, and user empathy.
Understanding of Agile framework and developer workflow tools.

internships.description: Uncover hidden insights, design dashboards for product operations, and build automated SQL data reports to optimize business workflows.
requirements: Strong proficiency in writing advanced SQL queries (joins, window functions).
Familiarity with Python data libraries (Pandas, NumPy) and data visualization.
Ability to translate unstructured data into clear business insights.
